subject: Jun 7th, 2026
fact: The session takes place on June 7th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Jun 7th, 2026

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz is a drow who was previously crossed paths with by the party.
source_quote: the voice of Arrizz, a drow they had crossed paths with before

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz states that he was once weak but will never be again.
source_quote: "I was weak once, never again."

subject: rogue mind flayer's lair
fact: The party stands before two sealed doors deep within the rogue mind flayer's lair.
source_quote: deep within the rogue mind flayer's lair

subject: Githyanki
fact: Six Githyanki are gathered around Arrizz in the room behind the left door.
source_quote: Six Githyanki — five warriors clad in ornate, exotic armor and a formidable knight

subject: Githyanki warrior
fact: Five Githyanki warriors are clad in ornate, exotic armor.
source_quote: five warriors clad in ornate, exotic armor

subject: Githyanki Knight
fact: A formidable Githyanki Knight bears a massive silvery greatsword.
source_quote: a formidable knight bearing a massive silvery greatsword

subject: massive silvery greatsword
fact: The Githyanki Knight bears a massive silvery greatsword.
source_quote: bearing a massive silvery greatsword

subject: post
fact: Arrizz is bound to a post.
source_quote: bound to a post

subject: scars
fact: Arrizz has vivid, colorful scars that mark his face from a disease he suffered long ago.
source_quote: vivid, colorful scars that still marked his face from a disease he had suffered long ago

subject: Githyanki
fact: The Githyanki are ancient enemies of mind flayers who are arrogant, warlike, and hostile to anyone beneath them.
source_quote: ancient enemies of mind flayers — arrogant, warlike, and deeply hostile to anyone they deemed beneath them

subject: Daein
fact: Daein eases the left door open with careful, practiced silence.
source_quote: Daein eased it open with careful, practiced silence

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim calls upon divine power to summon a swirling host of spectral guardians.
source_quote: Bramgrim called upon divine power, summoning a swirling host of spectral guardians

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas moves with hunter's precision, marking her targets and cutting them down one by one.
source_quote: Akritas moved with hunter's precision, marking her targets and cutting them down one by one

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear is too large to squeeze fully into the narrow hallway.
source_quote: too large to squeeze fully into the narrow hallway

subject: Githyanki Knight's escape
fact: The Githyanki Knight casts a powerful planar spell and vanishes entirely from the material world.
source_quote: he cast a powerful planar spell and vanished entirely from the material world

subject: Arrizz's rescue
fact: The party frees Arrizz from his bonds after the warriors are defeated and the knight flees.
source_quote: With the warriors defeated and the knight fled, the party freed Arrizz from his bonds

subject: magical mushroom
fact: The party feeds Arrizz a piece of their magical mushroom.
source_quote: The party fed him a piece of their magical mushroom

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz explains that the surface world is too bright and full of people smiling when they are not happy.
source_quote: too bright, too full of people smiling when they weren't happy

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz agrees to wait nearby and travel with the party for a time on the condition that they owe him a beer.
source_quote: on the condition that they owed him a beer

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz states that his eyes do not hurt in the Underdark.
source_quote: "You know the other thing I like about the Underdark? My eyes don't hurt."

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz refuses to eat brains, drawing a firm personal line against harvesting Githyanki brains.
source_quote: "We're not eating brains."

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur leads the investigation of the second sealed door.
source_quote: Felkur led the investigation

subject: fungal odor
fact: Felkur detects a faint, acrid odor hanging in the air like freshly cut grass in a humid field.
source_quote: a faint, acrid odor hanging in the air — something like freshly cut grass in a humid field

subject: fungal chamber
fact: The second chamber is stale and oppressive, coated in moss and fungus with several large orbs bobbing in the dim air.
source_quote: a stale, oppressive chamber coated in moss and fungus, with several large orbs bobbing gently in the dim air

subject: brain basin
fact: Another brain basin sits within the fungal chamber.
source_quote: Another brain basin sat within

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Felkur discovers an unconscious Duergar buried beneath a mound of debris and muck.
source_quote: Felkur discovered a humanoid shape buried beneath a mound of debris and muck

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum introduces herself as an unconscious Duergar who was waylaid by a Githyanki patrol.
source_quote: unconscious Duergar, who stirred awake and introduced herself as Thera Grabelthum

subject: Zhentarim Black Network
fact: Thera Grabelthum admits she was working as a spy for the Zhentarim Black Network.
source_quote: working as a spy for the Zhentarim Black Network

subject: Sporedome
fact: Thera was collecting intelligence on Sporedome and other Duergar operations.
source_quote: collecting intelligence on Sporedome and other Duergar operations

subject: Githyanki warrior
fact: Two Githyanki warriors burst from the muck in a coordinated ambush.
source_quote: Two Githyanki warriors burst from the muck in a coordinated ambush

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera turns invisible and slips away into the darkness.
source_quote: Thera turned invisible and slipped away into the darkness

subject: Intellect Devourer
fact: A grotesque creature emerges from the fallen warrior's skull: a pulsating brain walking on four feline legs.
source_quote: From the fallen warrior's skull, a grotesque creature emerged: a pulsating brain walking on four feline legs

subject: Intellect Devourer
fact: The Intellect Devourer turns its psychic power on the Owlbear, unleashing a devastating mental blast.
source_quote: It immediately turned its psychic power on the Owlbear, unleashing a devastating mental blast

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim rolls a natural 2 on his insight check to read the room.
source_quote: Bramgrim rolls a natural 2 on his insight check to read the room

subject: Glor
fact: Glor is a mind flayer representing the Ryxyg Illithid encampment.
source_quote: Glor — a mind flayer representing the Ryxyg Illithid encampment

subject: Ryxyg Illithid encampment
fact: Glor represents the Ryxyg Illithid encampment.
source_quote: representing the Ryxyg Illithid encampment

subject: fire giants
fact: Glor warned of fire giant siege weapons aimed at surface cities.
source_quote: warned of fire giant siege weapons aimed at surface cities

subject: Elder Brain's Collective
fact: The rogue mind flayer severed its connection to the Elder Brain's Collective.
source_quote: severed its connection to the Elder Brain's Collective

subject: four corpses
fact: The party found four corpses with surgically removed brains at the rogue's lair.
source_quote: four corpses with surgically removed brains

subject: detailed maps
fact: The party found detailed maps of surface cities at the rogue's lair.
source_quote: detailed maps of surface cities

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim is identified as the party member who speaks Undercommon.
source_quote: Bramgrim is identified as the party member who speaks Undercommon

subject: Plane Shift
fact: The Githyanki Knight uses Misty Step to reposition and delivers powerful greatsword strikes against the Owlbear.
source_quote: The Githyanki Knight uses Misty Step to reposition

subject: Spirit Guardians
fact: Bramgrim summons spectral Spirit Guardians that swirl around him in a wide radius.
source_quote: Bramgrim summons spectral Spirit Guardians that swirl around him in a wide radius

subject: Hunter's Mark
fact: Akritas marks a target with Hunter's Mark and swiftly cuts down one of the Githyanki warriors.
source_quote: Akritas marks a target with Hunter's Mark and swiftly cuts down one of the Githyanki warriors

subject: Action Surge
fact: Daein uses Action Surge to unleash a flurry of additional strikes.
source_quote: Daein uses Action Surge to unleash a flurry of additional strikes

subject: Spiritual Weapon
fact: Bramgrim summons a Spiritual Weapon and uses Toll the Dead against a wounded warrior.
source_quote: Bramgrim summons a Spiritual Weapon and uses Toll the Dead against a wounded warrior

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: The party feeds Thera a piece of magical mushroom, but it appears to have no effect on her.
source_quote: The party feeds her a piece of magical mushroom, but it appears to have no effect on her

subject: Underdark
fact: The party traveled through the Underdark for ten days to reach the rogue's lair.
source_quote: After ten days of travel through the Underdark

subject: Githyanki patrol
fact: Arrizz recounts being captured by a Githyanki patrol while traveling through the Underdark.
source_quote: captured by the Githyanki patrol while traveling through the Underdark

subject: Githyanki patrol
fact: Thera claims to be a traveler captured by a Githyanki patrol.
source_quote: claiming to be a traveler captured by a Githyanki patrol

fact: The party notes that the Githyanki's brains could serve as keys for the brain basin doors.
source_quote: Githyanki's brains could serve as keys for the brain basin doors

subject: brain basin
fact: The brain basin is consistent with the grim mechanisms encountered throughout the lair.
source_quote: consistent with the grim mechanisms they had already encountered throughout the lair

subject: Githyanki warriors
fact: Two Githyanki warriors emerge from the muck to ambush the party.
source_quote: Two Githyanki warriors emerge from the muck to ambush the party

subject: Thera
fact: Thera turns invisible and attempts to flee.
source_quote: Thera turns invisible and attempts to flee

subject: surprise round
fact: The Githyanki launch a surprise round, striking at the Owlbear and other party members.
source_quote: The Githyanki launch a surprise round, striking at the Owlbear and other party members

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear retaliates with powerful strikes against one of the warriors.
source_quote: The Owlbear retaliates with powerful strikes against one of the warriors

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur hurls a Firebolt at the attackers.
source_quote: Felkur hurls a Firebolt at the attackers

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas slays one of the Githyanki warriors.
source_quote: Akritas slays one of the Githyanki warriors

subject: Intellect Devourer
fact: A horrific four-legged brain creature bursts from the fallen Githyanki warrior's skull.
source_quote: a horrific four-legged brain creature — an Intellect Devourer — to burst from the fallen enemy's skull

subject: mind blast
fact: The Intellect Devourer uses a mind blast that successfully stuns the Owlbear.
source_quote: The Intellect Devourer uses a mind blast that successfully stuns the Owlbear

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas places Hunter's Mark on the Intellect Devourer.
source_quote: Akritas places Hunter's Mark on the Intellect Devourer

fact: Bramgrim summons a Guardian of Faith to hold the line.

fact: The remaining Githyanki warrior uses Misty Step to escape the party's reach.

fact: The Rogue Mind Flayer's Lair contains detailed maps of surface cities.

fact: The Silvery Greatsword was used to deliver powerful blows against the Owlbear during the skirmish in the lair.

subject: Glor's Map
fact: Glor's Map is a map provided by the mind flayer Glor to guide the party through the Underdark to the rogue mind flayer's hideout.
source_quote: A map provided by the mind flayer Glor to guide the party through the Underdark to the rogue mind flayer's hideout

subject: Spirit Guardians cast
fact: Bramgrim cast Spirit Guardians, summoning spectral spirits that swirled around him in a fifteen-foot radius.
source_quote: this spell summoned spectral spirits that swirled around him in a fifteen-foot radius

subject: Spirit Guardians damage
fact: The Spirit Guardians spell seared several Githyanki warriors with holy energy.
source_quote: searing several Githyanki warriors with holy energy

subject: Spirit Guardians effect
fact: The Spirit Guardians spell halved the speed of those who failed their saving throws.
source_quote: and halving the speed of those who failed their saving throws

subject: Spiritual Weapon summoned
fact: Bramgrim summoned Spiritual Weapon as a bonus action.
source_quote: Summoned by Bramgrim as a bonus action

fact: The Spiritual Weapon was conjured to strike at enemies from a distance during the battle with the Githyanki.
source_quote: this floating spectral weapon was conjured to strike at enemies from a distance during the battle with the Githyanki

subject: Toll the Dead cast
fact: Bramgrim used Toll the Dead to inflict necrotic damage on a wounded Githyanki warrior.
